name: nancay-radio-observatory
description: Interactive bilingual outreach website for the Nançay Radio Observatory.

scripts.build:site: npm run build && rm -rf assets && mkdir -p assets && cp -R dist/assets/. assets/ && cp dist/src/index.html index.html && perl -0pi -e 's#\.\./assets/#./assets/#g' index.html && cp index.html dist/index.html && rm -rf dist/src
